case_title: KALEB L. BEYENE VS. DORTHY FIELDS

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER FILED BY BEYENE, KALEB L.
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR CURING UNTIMELY PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,400.00 FILED BY BEYENE, KALEB L. AS TO DEFENDANT FIELDS, DORTHY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$85.00) SERVED AUG-18-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FIELDS, DORTHY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-16-2022 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO NOV-18-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF KALEB L. BEYENE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DORTHY FIELDS IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON 8-31-22 INDICATES SERVICE WAS DONE ON 8-18-22 WHICH IS 29 DAYS (1 DAY UNTIMELY). PROOF OF SERVICE ON SUBSTITUTE SERVICE OUTSIDE OF SAN FRANCISCO REQUIRES 30 DAYS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID YANG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
